name: PRD Generation
description: Synthesizes conversation context and codebase knowledge into a structured Product Requirements Document containing a problem statement, extensive user stories, implementation decisions, module boundaries, testing decisions, and out-of-scope items.

evidence.notes: Production skill that synthesises live conversation context into a fully-structured PRD and publishes it to the issue tracker.
Practical study: LLMs generate Functional Design Specifications and user stories from fragmented requirement sources in an IT consulting deployment.
